# GitHub Repository Settings

## Repository Description

**Short Description (350 chars max):**
```
Production-ready context database and MCP server for AI assistants. Provides code intelligence with hybrid search, call graphs, impact analysis, and semantic search for Cursor, VS Code, and Claude Desktop. Docker-first, 248 languages, auto-indexing.
```

- Figma (design from scratch)
- GitHub Social Preview Generator tools

## Repository Settings Checklist

- [ ] Add repository description
- [ ] Add 20 GitHub topics
- [ ] Upload social preview image (Settings â†’ Social preview)
- [ ] Enable Issues (if not already enabled)
- [ ] Enable Discussions (Settings â†’ Features â†’ Discussions)
- [ ] Add website URL
- [ ] Set default branch to `main`
- [ ] Enable "Automatically delete head branches" (Settings â†’ Pull Requests)
- [ ] Add repository labels:
  - `good-first-issue`
  - `help-wanted`
  - `enhancement`
  - `bug`
  - `documentation`
  - `performance`

## Sharing Checklist

After updating repository settings:

- [ ] Share on Reddit (r/cursor, r/programming)
- [ ] Share on Twitter/X with hashtags: #MCP #CursorIDE #AI #DevTools
- [ ] Post in Cursor Discord community
- [ ] Post in MCP community channels
- [ ] Consider Show HN on Hacker News
- [ ] Write a blog post on Dev.to or Medium
- [ ] Submit to Awesome MCP Servers list (if exists)
- [ ] Add to relevant "Awesome" lists on GitHub
